title: AudioAnalyser
description: Lightweight visualisation analyser backed by a Web Audio AnalyserNode. Accepts any of: AudioBus, Voice, MediaStream, AudioNode, or null. The tap is a parallel branch — it does not affect the source's main routing. Tap a bus for a whole submix, or an individual Voice (its `output` node) for a single playing instance.

sections.title: Import
paragraphs: Lightweight visualisation analyser backed by a Web Audio AnalyserNode.

Accepts any of: AudioBus, Voice, MediaStream, AudioNode, or null. The tap is a parallel branch — it does not affect the source's main routing. Tap a bus for a whole submix, or an individual Voice (its `output` node) for a single playing instance.

members.name: new
members.description: Create an AudioAnalyser with the given options. The underlying AnalyserNode is created immediately if the AudioContext is already running, or deferred until onAudioContextReady fires.

members.name: destroy
members.description: Disconnect the analyser tap, release the internal AnalyserNode, and cancel any pending setup callbacks. Call when the analyser is no longer needed to avoid memory leaks.

members.name: getBandEnergy
members.description: Return the mean energy of frequency bins in the given Hz range, normalised 0..1. Uses the byte spectrum (0..255), normalised by dividing by 255.

members.name: getLowMidHigh
members.description: Return low (0-250 Hz), mid (250-2 kHz), and high (2 k-20 kHz) band energies (0..1 each).

members.name: getRms
members.description: Return overall RMS energy across all bins, normalised 0..1.

members.name: getSpectrum
members.description: Fill and return the byte frequency spectrum (0..255 per bin).

members.name: getSpectrumFloat
members.description: Fill and return the float frequency spectrum (dB per bin).

members.name: getSpectrumLog
members.description: Log-scaled spectrum, byte domain (0..255). Output length = bands. Bins are spaced so each output covers an equal fraction of the log2(fMax / fMin) octave range — useful when you want a frequency-axis visualization where each octave gets the same width.

members.name: getSpectrumLogFloat
members.description: Log-scaled spectrum, float domain (dBFS values). Output length = bands.

members.name: getSpectrumMel
members.description: Mel-scaled spectrum, byte domain (0..255). Output length = bands. Each output bin is a triangular-weighted sum of the linear FFT bins underneath it, mel-spaced from fMin to fMax.

members.name: getSpectrumMelFloat
members.description: Mel-scaled spectrum, float domain (dBFS values). Output length = bands.

members.name: getWaveform
members.description: Fill and return the byte time-domain waveform (0..255 per sample).

members.name: getWaveformFloat
members.description: Fill and return the float time-domain waveform (-1..1 per sample).

members.name: frequencyBinCount
members.description: Number of frequency bins available — half of fftSize.

members.name: source
members.description: The currently tapped audio source, or null if none is set. Assigning a new value disconnects the previous tap and connects the new source as a parallel branch without affecting the source's main routing.
